description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a distressed, grayish-white exterior showing signs of rust and grime, especially around the top and bottom edges. The surface is rough and uneven, with visible patches of corrosion and peeling paint, giving it an aged, industrial look. Prominently displayed on one side is a 'No Photos' sign, featuring a red circle and slash over a black camera icon, along with partially legible text. The top of the barrel is closed and appears to be solid, with dark, rusted areas and no visible openings or handles. There are no visible reinforcements or banding, and the barrel lacks any additional features such as spouts or lids. This object is typical of those found in urban or industrial environments, possibly used for waste, storage, or as a deterrent in restricted areas.
description: A weathered, rust-stained metal barrel with a 'No Photos' sign and a rough, distressed surface. The top is closed and the exterior is marked by corrosion and peeling paint.
description_view_0: The front shows the faded 'No Photos' sign and part of the warning text, with heavy rust and grime near the top edge.
description_view_1: This view centers the 'No Photos' symbol and more of the warning text, highlighting the distressed paint and corroded surface.
description_view_2: The side is mostly plain, with minimal markings and a continuation of the weathered, gray surface.
description_view_3: The back is featureless, showing only the rough, worn metal with no visible text or symbols.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: 'No Photos' sign with red circle and slash over camera icon, partial text
